results.title: Continental adds 3m tire capacity at Rayong, Thailand
results.description: Continental has opened the expansion of its Rayong tire plant in Thailand, backed by an investment exceeding THB13bn (US$403m) The post Continental adds 3m tire capacity at Rayong, Thailand appeared first on Automotive World .

results.title: West Asia conflict may dent India Inc profitability by 200 bps: Crisil
results.description: A prolonged West Asia conflict poses a risk to India Inc's profitability. Crisil Ratings predicts a significant drop in operating margins due to supply chain issues and rising costs. However, strong company balance sheets are expected to protect overall credit quality. Some sectors like ceramics and airlines face severe stress. Other export-oriented sectors might benefit from a weaker rupee.

results.title: Jigawa secures $2bn investment interest from Chinese investors
results.description: The proposed investment, which is expected to focus on the revitalization of the Maigatari Border Free Trade Zone and the establishment of multiple industrial ventures, is yet another major step in Jigawa States drive to attract strategic foreign direct investment and accelerate industrialization.The post Jigawa secures $2bn investment interest from Chinese investors appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.
